official_status_source_name: Northwest Little League official locations page
future_status_protocol: If Northwest Little League publishes a live rainout/status page or explicit weather closure feed, enable polling only after parser tests. The current locations page is not a live rainout feed.
agent_rule: Official source wins. This locations page confirms the league fields but is not a live rainout feed, so keep official status unknown unless a clear official closure/cancellation source is found. Tell the user to check the official source before leaving.
